Cllfiffl~~ ~<Wf ~"tt'R'fCCl, ~ 3felCIT ~ r.<:@ffi~ ~~cfmx· I [.t 31R.~ 'lt't-120 131318/1998rof;;it!1!;1 'lt't-5] ~.d1:!~ MINISTRY OF SHIPPING, ROAD TRANSPORT AND HIGHWAYS. (Department of Road Transport and Highways) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 13th June, 2006 . _ S.O. 889(~).-. In exercise of the powers conferred by sections 7 and 8 A of the National Highway Act, 1956 (48 of 1956), the Central Government hereby notifies that there shall be levied, collected and retained fees on mechanical vehicles, for the use of the Four- Lane Raipur-Durg Section between km 281.000 to km 307.600 of NH-6 in the State of Chhattisgarh at the rates specified in Schedule hereunder and having regard to the Concession Agreement dated the 8th May 2003 entered into with M/s DSC-VICON Ventures Pvt. Ltd, New Delhi having its registered office at C-66 , South Extension, Part -II , New Delhi- ll 0049,. to build, operate and transfer the Four Lane Raipur Durg Section of NH76. and for the service provided by it, hereby authorizes the said M/s DSC-VICON Ventures Pvt. Ltd, New Delhi or its authorized legal representative to collect and retain fees at the rates specified in the said Schedule from the date of publication of the notification in the Official Gazette and until the 2nd March, 20 15. 3 -- 3 of 5 -- 4 THE GAZEITEOF INDIA: EXTRAORDINARY [PART Il-5EC. 3(ii)] SCHEDULE ----·-- o be recovered per trip from users of the Four-Lane Raipur- Durg Section between km. r·--·---·-- ' Rates t \ 28~.000 to km. 307.600 of National Highway No.6 at either of the two toll plazas r~~: ounts in Ru12ees) Period To Ik-; of 30th June- !~:~~icati jthe on of 2007 ;~--- ion in : notif1cat [ the 0 ~azette fficial 1 OlstJul \2007 y 01 st Ju 2009 ly --- O!stJu 2013 Note: ly ly -- -·· 30th June 2009 - 30th June 2011 30th June 2013 --2nd March 2015 Motor Car, Taxi, Jeep, Pick-up Van, Station wagon, Tempo, Auto rickshaws, three wheeler scooters, or other Auto driven light vehicles with or without trailer 17 18 20 22 I-· 24 ----- Fee from each type of vehicle Light Bus truck and Other Commercial other heavy mechanically vehicles vehicles propelled including truck vehicles not trailer mentioned combination above such as laden with heavy goods or construction passengers or machinery unladen and earth moving equipments ··- 28 55 121 30 61 133 ' 33 67 146 37" 73 161 40 81 177 ----------- Following types of vehicles are exempted from the fee specified in the schedule, namely:- (A) The Vehicles having 'VIP' symbols or officially belonging to- (i) the President of India; (ii) the Vice- President oflndia; (iii) the Central and State Minister; (iv) the Leaders of Opposition of Lok Sabha or R.<yya Sabha or State Legislatures having the status of Cabinet Mini~ter ; (vJ the Governors of State ; (vi) the Lieutenant Governors of Union Territories; (vii) the Speakers or Chairman of Central and State Legislatures ; ('<iii) the Executive Councilors of local elected bodies; ~----------- --- -- 4 of 5 -- ['WTH-WJS3(ii)] (ix) the Foreign dignitaries on State visit to India ; (x) the Foreign Diplomats Stationed in India using car with CD symbols ; (xi) the Members of State Legislative Assembly/ Council in their constituencies ; (xii) a Member of Parliament; (xiii) the Members of State Legislative Assembly/ Legislative Council of Chhattisgarh ; (B) (i) Defence Vehicles; (ii) Police Vehicles ; (iii) Fire Fighting Vehicles ; (iv) Ambulances; (v) Funeral Vanes ; (vi) Post and telegraph Department Vehi~les; (vii) Central and State Government VehiCles on Duty ; (C) Vehicles belonging to Winner of Gallantry awards such as Paramvir Chakra, Ashok Chakra, Mahavir Chakra, Kirti Chakra, Vir Chakra, Shaurya Chakra, if such awardee produces his photo identity card duly authenticated by the competent authority for such award. The above mentioned rates shall be displayed on a Board erected at conspicuous places in the vicinity of the Toll Plaza, being legibly written in English, Hindi and the regional language of the area in which the four Lane Section is situated. Every driver, owner or person-in- charge of the mechanical vehicles shall, before crossing the Four Lane Section or after having crossed it, stop his vehicle at the cross bar and pay the fee leviable in respect of the vehicles at the fee. collection booth. The Person authorized by M/s DSC-VICON Ventures Pvt, Ltd, New Delhi, to collect fee in respect of any mechanical vehicle crossing the Four Lane. Sectiqn shall in return, prepare receipt to the driver, owner or person in charge of the mechanical vehicle. [No. RW/NH-12013131811998/CG/NH-5} PRABHAKAR, Dy. Secy.
